reviews.comment:
la peor antencion que tuve en una ypf, muy lentos

(Translated by Google)
The worst service I've ever had at a YPF station, very slow.

Good place
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUROaDdiYlFREAE

reviews.comment:
Buen lugar. Amplio. Baños relativamente limpios. Atención correcta. Parada técnica Nada mal.

(Translated by Google)
Good location. Spacious. Relatively clean bathrooms. Decent service. Not bad for a pit stop.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURObmJPSjN3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Una muy buena opción para hacer una parada en el viaje, con un amplio parque arbolado con mesas y buena sombra para descansar un rato, con local para comprar comida, bebidas y mas

(Translated by Google)
A great option for a stop along the way, with a large wooded park with tables and good shade to rest for a while, and a place to buy food, drinks and more
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURObFlTQlZREAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buen lugar para realizar parada técnica (comer algo, tomar unos mates y una sombra hermosa bajo unos arboles). La atención de sus empleados es muy buena. El baño muy limpio. Y ahora agregaron un restaurante en una carpa atrás de la estación.

(Translated by Google)
A great place for a pit stop (to grab a bite to eat, sip some mate, and enjoy some lovely shade under some trees). The staff is very attentive. The restroom is very clean. And now they've added a restaurant in a tent behind the station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUROLWJhV1RBEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUROMmRIU1lREAE

reviews.comment:
Me encantó. No iba desde que era una peque. Esta muy bien mantenido, la gente un 10. Si sos socio del ACA te dan agua para el mate y tenes descuento en todo lo que consumas. Volveremos a pasar en nuestro próximo viaje por ruta 2

(Translated by Google)
I loved it. I hadn't been since I was a little girl. It's very well maintained, and the people are fantastic. If you're an ACA member, they give you hot water for your mate and you get a discount on everything you buy. We'll definitely stop by again on our next trip along Route 2.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUROOGFuaTFnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buen lugar para descansar lastima q la gente sea sucia,tiran los desperdicios al piso teniendo tachos y tapan las piletas con yerba

(Translated by Google)
Good place to rest, it's a shame that people are dirty, they throw trash on the ground even though there are bins and they clog the sinks with weeds.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUROOGZ6OWJ3EAE
